master_plan.worker_prompt: Analyze and improve the algorithmic decision-making logic
Tune hyperparameters and constants for better performance

reviewer_feedback: Approved with score 7/10. Changes: 5-tier preflop hand classification, river 3-branch decision framework, wider BB defense, increased raise sizing ~10-15%. Risk areas: river logic may bypass edge-case handling, larger raise sizing increases variance, anti-lock pressure preflop ratios nearly doubled, betting.py doubled in size.
